tagline: Cultivate vibrant soundscapes, season by season.

designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — bold, energetic, geometric block layout with high color contrast, glassmorphic card surfaces, animated waveforms, and glowing seed orbs. Light mode default with seamless dark mode toggle.

screenDetails.home: Dashboard with seasonal biome hero card, XP progress bar, scrollable sound seeds collection, daily quests with progress bars, and Sprig AI conversational widget
screenDetails.explore: Boreal Forest biome deep-dive with animated waveform header, interactive quest accordion, and a multi-step conversational discovery chat with Sprig AI guide
screenDetails.alchemy: Spatial sound mixing canvas with orbiting seed orbs, play/pause center button, glow animations, per-seed volume sliders, global reverb control, and Grove share CTA
screenDetails.grove: Global community tapestry with stats header, filter tabs, animated waveform bloom cards with like/share/listen actions, and trending community soundscapes
